root_cause: kube-apiserver is unreachable, so control-plane clients cannot talk to the Kubernetes API
evidence: Recent kube-apiserver outage targets pod 'kube-apiserver-cp-1' with container 'kube-apiserver' state=waiting restartCount=9
Representative kube-apiserver outage signal: Readiness probe failed: Get "https://127.0.0.1:6443/readyz?verbose": dial tcp 127.0.0.1:6443: connect: connection refused
Kubernetes service 'kubernetes' currently has no ready API endpoints

Representative downstream API client failure: leaderelection lost: failed to renew lease kube-system/kube-controller-manager: Get "https://127.0.0.1:6443/apis/coordination.k8s.io/v1/namespaces/kube-system/leases/kube-controller-manager": dial tcp 127.0.0.1:6443: connect: connection refused
Workload reconciliation symptom: Deployment 'payments-api' remains at 1/3 available replicas while only 1/3 replicas are updated

causes.message: Cluster control-plane components and API-dependent workloads require kube-apiserver reachability
kube-apiserver is not reachable on its control-plane endpoint or through the kubernetes Service VIP
Control-plane clients and controller-managed workloads stop progressing when the API server cannot be reached

pod:kube-apiserver-cp-1: Readiness probe failed: Get "https://127.0.0.1:6443/readyz?verbose": dial tcp 127.0.0.1:6443: connect: connection refused
service:kubernetes: No ready endpoints back the kubernetes Service VIP
pod:kube-controller-manager-cp-1: leaderelection lost: failed to renew lease kube-system/kube-controller-manager: Get "https://127.0.0.1:6443/apis/coordination.k8s.io/v1/namespaces/kube-system/leases/kube-controller-manager": dial tcp 127.0.0.1:6443: connect: connection refused
deployment:payments-api: Deployment 'payments-api' remains at 1/3 available replicas while only 1/3 replicas are updated
pod:payments-api-7f8c7d66c4-r8j7l: The pod depends on Kubernetes API reachability and is affected while kube-apiserver is unavailable

likely_causes: The kube-apiserver static pod is crashlooping or failing /readyz on the control-plane node
Port 6443 or host-network reachability on the control-plane node is unavailable
An etcd or local dependency failure is preventing kube-apiserver from becoming ready
Static-pod manifest drift, certificate issues, or startup flag errors left kube-apiserver unhealthy
suggested_checks: kubectl get endpoints kubernetes -n default -o yaml
Inspect kube-apiserver /readyz and local 6443 listener health on the control-plane node
